title: Google DeepMind introduces Gemini Omni Flash for conversational video generation and editing
friendlyTitle: Google DeepMind introduces Gemini Omni Flash for conversational video generation and editing
summary: Google DeepMind announced Gemini Omni, beginning with Gemini Omni Flash, a multimodal model for creating and editing video from text, images, audio, and video through conversation.
friendlySummary: Google DeepMind announced Gemini Omni, beginning with Gemini Omni Flash, a multimodal model for creating and editing video from text, images, audio, and video through conversation.
whyItMatters: Video creation is becoming less like operating editing software and more like directing an assistant. That changes how creators, marketers, educators, and small businesses can produce visual material quickly.
